one_time_description: Gain on the sale of swordfish license
economic_notes: Fort Folly First Nation operates commercial fishing (Fort Folly Fisheries), forestry contracts, and has a gas bar arrangement with Gitpo Tobacco & Gasoline Inc. owned by Chief and Councillor. Land conservation activities through Canada Nature Fund program establishing Indigenous Protected and Conserved Areas.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is New Brunswick. ISC funding includes both Indigenous Services Canada ($1,549,272) and ISC First Nations and Inuit Health Branch ($667,830) totalling $2,217,102. First year adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations resulted in recognition of $489,808 ARO liability for asbestos and water well decommissioning. Also adopted PS 3450 and PS 2601 prospectively. Gain on sale of swordfish license ($350,000) is a one-time item. Related party transaction with Gitpo Tobacco & Gasoline Inc. (owned by Chief and Councillor) for HST rebate sharing. Segment disclosure schedules (pages 17-18) appear garbled/reversed in source text and could not be extracted. No remuneration schedule included in provided text. The trust fund and replacement reserve fund are consolidated. No subsidiaries or GBEs identified.
